title: DAO Racing announces Isle of Man TT return with BSB star Josh Brookes
summary: DAO Racing has announced its road racing return for 2026, which includes competing at the Isle of Man TT.

title: Suzuki GSX-8T and GSX-8TT given new prices
summary: Suzuki has continued its price realignment scheme by making the GSX-8T and GSX-8TT cheaper than before.

title: Brembo Hyction carbon ceramic disc used on a motorcycle for the first time
summary: Brembo brings hypercar braking technology to road-going motorcycles for the first time, and it’s Ducati’s special Superleggera V4 that benefits first.

title: 2026 Honda XL750 Transalp E-Clutch - Review
summary: Honda brings E-Clutch technology to its excellent middleweight adventure machine.

title: Indian Motorcycle reveals new finance offer across PowerPlus and Chief line-ups
summary: Indian Motorcycle has revealed fresh finance offers across its PowerPlus and Chief line-ups, and this is how much it will cost to own one monthly.
